query: Get comprehensive company profile data for the company named "Nothing But NET". The company's official website domain is nothingbutnet.com — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Gather information from LinkedIn, G2, Reddit, and other reliable sources. Include company details, reviews, industry codes (UNSPSC, NAICS, ISIC), and market sentiment.
answer:
**Executive Summary**
Nothing But NET (NBN) is a privately held Managed Services Provider (MSP) specializing in IT solutions, cloud computing, and cybersecurity. The company has established a strong reputation in the MSP sector, frequently appearing on industry ranking lists such as the Channel Futures MSP 501. While customer and employee sentiment is generally positive, public data regarding the company's financial footprint and founding history contains significant contradictions.

**Company Details & Operations**
Nothing But NET operates primarily in the IT services sector, providing cloud computing, hosting, virtualization, data security, data backup, monitoring, and help desk support [Nothing But NET | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nothing-but-net). 
*   **Leadership:** The company is led by Co-Founder and President Bob Cox, alongside Co-Founder and Vice President Steve Brown [Nothing But NET - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/nothing-but-net). 
*   **Size and Footprint:** As of April 2026, the company employs approximately 135 people across five continents [Nothing But NET Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/nothing-but-net/5a1da1db23000054009363ed). 
*   **Locations:** NBN is headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona. Its official website lists offices at 615 N 48th Street (Suite 1036) and 2500 W Union Hills Dr in Phoenix, as well as an office in Gilbert, AZ [About Compliance Cloud One (CC1) - Nothing But Net](https://nothingbutnet.com/about). Additional sources note a Chandler, AZ administrative office [Nothing But NET - Your Trusted IT Business Partner](https://nothingbutnet.com/) and a presence in Edison, New Jersey [Nothing But NET Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/nothing-but-net/5a1da1db23000054009363ed).
*   **Infrastructure:** The company utilizes Tier III Security-Class Iron Mountain Data Centers [Nothing But NET Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/nothing-but-net/5a1da1db23000054009363ed) and deploys ESET PROTECT solutions to meet 100% of its clients' cybersecurity needs [Nothing But NET Enhances Cybersecurity with ESET Solutions](https://www.eset.com/us/business/resource-center/customer-stories/nothing-but-net/).
*   **Industry Codes:** The company operates under NAICS code 5415 (Computer Systems Design and Related Services) [Nothing But NET Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/nothing-but-net/5a1da1db23000054009363ed).

**Market Sentiment & Industry Recognition**
Nothing But NET has a documented history of industry recognition, though it has recently faced vendor partnership challenges.
*   **Rankings:** NBN was ranked #7 among global elite MSPs on the Channel Futures 2023 MSP 501 list [Nothing But Net Ranked #7 on Channel Futures 2023 MSP 501—Tech Industry’s Most Prestigious List of Managed Service Providers Worldwide - PR.com](https://www.pr.com/press-release/891112). It subsequently ranked #20 in 2024 [Nothing But NET](https://contentmx.com/b/page/page.php?u=NothingbutNET) and #232 on the 2025 list [Nothing But NET - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/nothing-but-net/353762501). Historically, it appeared on the Inc. 5000 list in 2008, 2015, and 2016 [Nothing But NET | Inc.com](https://www.inc.com/profile/nothing-but-net], and was named to the CRN Pioneer 250 in 2019 [Nothing But NET - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/nothing-but-net/353762501).
*   **Vendor Challenges:** Following Broadcom's $61 billion acquisition of VMware in November 2023, Nothing But NET was deauthorized as a VMware partner. Clients were reportedly told the MSP was "not big enough" to carry the product, causing frustration for at least one 16-year client [Nothing But NET - Products, Competitors, Financials, Employees, Headquarters Locations](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/nothing-but-net-1).

**Customer and Employee Reviews**
Client feedback indicates strong performance in cybersecurity and customer service, while employee reviews highlight a demanding but educational work environment.
*   **Customer Feedback:** NBN holds a 4.7-star rating across 15 reviews on Birdeye [Nothing But Net - 15 Reviews - Business Services in Phoenix, AZ - Birdeye](https://reviews.birdeye.com/nothing-but-net-659508992). A commercial bank client credited NBN with fortifying network security and navigating an annual audit [Nothing But NET - Your Trusted IT Business Partner](https://nothingbutnet.com/). Another healthcare client reported switching to NBN to escape language barriers and slow resolution times (over an hour for simple issues) with a previous provider [Testimonials - Nothing But Net](https://nothingbutnet.com/testimonials/).
*   **Employee Sentiment:** On Glassdoor, NBN maintains a 4.0 overall rating based on 3 to 4 reviews, with a perfect 5.0 rating for culture and values. Employees report excellent exposure to various technologies, though they note that work hours can be "challenging at times" due to the volume of companies supported [Working at Nothing But NET | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Nothing-But-NET-EI_IE885835.11,26.htm); [Nothing But NET Reviews in Phoenix, AZ | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Nothing-But-NET-Phoenix-Reviews-EI_IE885835.0,15_IL.16,23_IM678.htm).
*   **BBB Status:** The company has a Better Business Bureau profile for its Phoenix location but is not BBB accredited [Nothing But NET | BBB Business Profile | Better Business Bureau](https://www.bbb.org/us/az/phoenix/profile/information-technology-services/nothing-but-net-1126-1000040211).

**Gaps and Limitations**
*   **Contradictory Founding Date:** PitchBook reports the company was founded in 1988 [nothing but net Company Profile: Valuation & Investors | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/128747-71), while LeadIQ, LinkedIn, and the company's official website state it was founded in 2001 [Nothing But NET Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/nothing-but-net/5a1da1db23000054009363ed).
*   **Conflicting Revenue Data:** Annual revenue estimates vary drastically, with ZoomInfo estimating approximately $5.4 million [Nothing But NET - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/nothing-but-net/353762501) and LeadIQ estimating between $25 million and $50 million [Nothing But NET Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/nothing-but-net/5a1da1db23000054009363ed).
*   **Missing Review Platforms:** No reviews for this specific company could be located on G2 or Clutch.co; searches on these platforms only returned unrelated entities (e.g., "Net Solutions", the Microsoft ".NET" framework, and "Nothing But Web") [Net Solutions Reviews 2026: Details, Pricing, & Features | G2](https://www.g2.com/products/net-solutions/reviews); [Nothing But Web Client Reviews | Clutch.co](https://clutch.co/profile/nothing-web).
*   **Lack of Reddit Sentiment:** Reddit searches for "Nothing But Net" yielded no relevant B2B discussions, returning only unrelated consumer topics such as the video game Rocket League and basketball highlights [r/RocketLeague on Reddit: NOTHING BUT NET](https://www.reddit.com/r/RocketLeague/comments/1p9zr2p/nothing_but_net/).
*   **Missing Industry Codes:** UNSPSC and ISIC codes were not available in the provided research findings.
